analyst_note: Main claim: "reaching net zero by 2050 ... aligned with the Corporate Net-Zero Standard of the Science Based [Targets initiative]" (ABB Sustainability Statement 2025.pdf, p53). SBTi: Targets set, 1.5°C near-term target (2030). 8-Test: 0 PARTIAL, 0 FAIL, 0 MISSING -> PASS. CSRD/ESRS Sustainability Statement. Strong throughout — SBTi-validated Net-Zero-Standard targets, explicit 2019/2022 baselines, KPMG limited assurance, disclosed climate capex. One MED (limited assurance level).
